title: Human Intervention Requirement and Recursive Improvement Gate
one_sentence: This module detects recursive improvement externally by measuring human intervention requirement, TCC-weighted intervention burden, delegation completion cost, and human bottleneck/dropout gates.

core_compression.DCC_formula: DCC_i = Cost(delegate_i + retrieve_i + verify_i + repair_i + apply_i)
core_compression.recursive_improvement_signal: HIB decreases while AI cycle time shortens and AI-generated improvement acceptance rises
core_compression.bottleneck_risk: Cycle_AI < TCC_human_eval while HIR remains mandatory

negative_constraints: Do not classify recursive improvement itself as danger.
Do not infer human functional necessity merely from human presence in the loop.
Classify cost mismatch, delegation cost, and intervention-bottleneck dynamics only.
